zh.Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Al: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易梅爾可爾
zh.Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, France: 法國利姆辛可雷梅爾可爾
zh.Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Al: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易梅爾可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Mercoeur於大約1250年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易梅爾可爾時，她的父親Béraud de Mercoeur VIII43歲，母親Béatrix de Bourbon38歲。她和Guillaume de Blondel Joigny至少有1個兒子。她去世於1297年享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Mercoeur于大约1250年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易梅爾可爾时，她的父亲Béraud de Mercoeur VIII43岁，母亲Béatrix de Bourbon38岁。她和Guillaume de Blondel Joigny至少有1个儿子。她去世于1297年享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Mercoeur was born about 1250, in Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Béraud de Mercoeur VIII, was 43 and her mother, Béatrix de Bourbon, was 38. She had at least 1 son with Guillaume de Blondel Joigny. She died in 1297, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Mercoeur est née environ 1250, à Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Béraud de Mercoeur VIII, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Bourbon, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Guillaume de Blondel Joigny. Elle est décédée en 1297, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Mercoeur um 1250 in Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Béraud de Mercoeur VIII 43 und ihre Mutter Béatrix de Bourbon 38. Sie hatte mit Guillaume de Blondel Joigny mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1297 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Mercoeur è nata il circa 1250 nel Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Béraud de Mercoeur VIII, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Béatrix de Bourbon, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Guillaume de Blondel Joigny. Morì nel 1297, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Al: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーメルコエウル
ja.Mercoeur, Corrèze, Limousin, France: フランスリモウシンコルeズメルコエウル
ja.Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Al: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーメルコエウル
ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Mercoeurが約1250年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーメルコエウルで生まれた時，父Béraud de Mercoeur VIIIは43歳，母Béatrix de Bourbonは38歳であった。彼女はGuillaume de Blondel Joignyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1297年に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Mercoeur(이)가 대략 1250년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-로이르 머코우르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Béraud de Mercoeur VIII(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrix de Bourbon(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume de Blondel Joigny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Mercoeur nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Béraud de Mercoeur VIII, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Bourbon, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Guillaume de Blondel Joigny. Ela faleceu em 1297, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Mercoeur родилась около 1250 г. в местности миркоеур, хауте-лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Béraud de Mercoeur VIII было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Bourbon, 38. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Guillaume de Blondel Joigny. Она умерла в 1297 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Mercoeur nació aproximadamente 1250, en Mercoeur, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Béraud de Mercoeur VIII, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Bourbon, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Guillaume de Blondel Joigny. Murió en 1297, a la edad de 48 años.
